title: Moon Darkens 月色漸濃
body:
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfb5e5d5146d84d36babbd7f6a616c9176430ca1.png)
# 月色漸濃 - 輕量材質包 | Moon Darkens - Light weight texture pack
### 可愛有趣的萌系原味材質包！1.21或以上版本適配！
### Cute and fun vanilla-like pack for 1.21 and later versions!
## 包含內容 Content including:
### 1. 方塊類 Blocks
- 貓貓臉雕刻南瓜和南瓜燈 Cat Carved Pumpkin and Jack o' Lantern
- 貓貓臉TNT炸藥 Cat TNT
- 水元素史萊姆方塊 Hydro Slime Blocks
- 漸變色黑曜石 Color-transitioning Obsidian
- 礦物邊框 Ore overlay
- 陷阱儲物箱紅色提示 Trapped Chest overlay
- 灰色岩漿 Grey Lava
### 2. 生物類 Mobs
- 七七僵尸 Qiqi Zombie
- 甘雨骷髏 Ganyu Skeleton
- 刻晴凋零骷髏 Keqing Wither Skeleton
- 水元素史萊姆 Hydro Slime
### 3. 物品類 Items
- 力量弓以及對應拉弓動畫 Power Bow and its corresponding animation
- 原石地獄之星 Primogem Nether Star
- 水元素史萊姆球 Hydro Slime Ball
- 異色箭矢 Special Arrow
### 4. 界面類 UI
- 黑暗模式用戶界面 Dark Themed UI
- 綠色[所聞遍計]物品説明方框 Green "All Scheme to Know" Item Tooltip
- 草之花盔甲值 Dendro Flower Armor Bar
- 蘿蔔飢餓值 Carrot Hunger Bar
### 5. 其他 Others
- 自訂跳字系列 Custom Splash Text
- 自訂主頁面背景 Custom Panorama
- 兩款納西妲繪畫 Two types of Nahida Painting
- 32x圓潤字體 32x smooth Font Type
### 已知錯誤 Known Issue
材質包在特定低版本使用時會有機率載入失敗，將在後續版本修復\
There is a tiny chance to fail loading the texture pack in specific lower versions of the game. This will be fixed in later update.
